Infectum.turoyo: noše nuxroye aṯən ḏ̣ayfe gaban w-oṯən noše me gaban məʕtadən aʕlayye hano lat-yo ṭowo b-u=ḥaq d-i=mamlak-ayḏi
translations:
‘Foreign
			people came to us as guests, and some of us go and infringe on
			these people (guests)? This is not right according to the law of
			my kingdom’ 83/87;
